content: And don’t rush through tonight. I hid things for you.

caption: This night felt like it needed its own soundtrack.

content: 18 already feels illegal honestly 😭 but seriously, I hope this year brings you softer days, a calmer mind, good health, genuine happiness, and moments that finally feel light instead of heavy. May Allah protect your peace, your future, your heart, and everything you quietly carry inside. And may this year bring you closer to the version of yourself you’re still becoming 🌙
okay the night is becoming dangerously cinematic now so before you accuse me of overdoing this…there’s still more 😭

files.name: 6.mp4
files.caption: this one feels like 2am city lights

content: I know life moves fast and people usually rush through moments without sitting inside them properly, but I didn’t want this night to feel random or forgettable for you. So instead of making one giant thing, I hid smaller things everywhere. Some are funny, some soft, some meaningful, and some are probably a little stupid 😭. But all of it was made carefully.
So open this slowly. Some things inside are quieter than they look 🌙
